ProcessedFindings.description: The list of findings that were updated successfully.

UnprocessedFindings.description: The list of V2 findings that were not updated.

HubV2Arn.description: The ARN of the V2 resource that was created.

ProcessedAutomationRules.description: A list of properly processed rule ARNs.

UnprocessedAutomationRules.description: A list of objects containing RuleArn, ErrorCode, and ErrorMessage. This parameter tells you which automation rules the request didn't delete and why.

StandardsSubscriptions.description: The details of the standards subscriptions that were disabled.
The details of the standards subscriptions that were enabled.

Rules.description: A list of rule details for the provided rule ARNs.

UnprocessedAutomationRules.description: A list of objects containing RuleArn, ErrorCode, and ErrorMessage. This parameter tells you which automation rules the request didn't retrieve and why.

ConfigurationPolicyAssociations.description: Describes associations for the target accounts, OUs, or the root.

UnprocessedConfigurationPolicyAssociatio.description: An array of configuration policy associations, one for each configuration policy association identifier, that was specified in the request but couldn’t be processed due to an error.

SecurityControls.description: An array that returns the identifier, Amazon Resource Name (ARN), and other details about a security control. The same information is returned whether the request includes SecurityControlId or SecurityControlArn.

UnprocessedIds.description: A security control (identified with SecurityControlId, SecurityControlArn, or a mix of both parameters) for which details cannot be returned.

StandardsControlAssociationDetails.description: Provides the enablement status of a security control in a specified standard and other details for the control in relation to the specified standard.

UnprocessedAssociations.description: A security control (identified with SecurityControlId, SecurityControlArn, or a mix of both parameters) whose enablement status in a specified standard cannot be returned.

FailedCount.description: The number of findings that failed to import.

SuccessCount.description: The number of findings that were successfully imported.

FailedFindings.description: The list of findings that failed to import.

ProcessedAutomationRules.description: A list of properly processed rule ARNs.

UnprocessedAutomationRules.description: A list of objects containing RuleArn, ErrorCode, and ErrorMessage. This parameter tells you which automation rules the request didn't update and why.

ProcessedFindings.description: The list of findings that were updated successfully.

UnprocessedFindings.description: The list of findings that were not updated.

UnprocessedAssociationUpdates.description: A security control (identified with SecurityControlId, SecurityControlArn, or a mix of both parameters) whose enablement status in a specified standard couldn't be updated.

ConnectorArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connectorV2.

ConnectorId.description: The UUID of the connectorV2 to identify connectorV2 resource.

ActionTargetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the custom action target.

AggregationRegion.description: The Amazon Web Services Region where data is aggregated.

RegionLinkingMode.description: Determines how Regions are linked to an Aggregator V2.

LinkedRegions.description: The list of Regions that are linked to the aggregation Region.

RuleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the automation rule that you created.
The ARN of the V2 automation rule.

RuleId.description: The ID of the V2 automation rule.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the configuration policy.

Id.description: The universally unique identifier (UUID) of the configuration policy.

Name.description: The name of the configuration policy.

Description.description: The description of the configuration policy.

UpdatedAt.description: The date and time, in UTC and ISO 8601 format, that the configuration policy was last updated.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time, in UTC and ISO 8601 format, that the configuration policy was created.

ConfigurationPolicy.description: An object that defines how Security Hub is configured. It includes whether Security Hub is enabled or disabled, a list of enabled security standards, a list of enabled or disabled security controls, and a list of custom parameter values for specified controls. If the request included a list of security controls that are enabled in the configuration policy, Security Hub disables all other controls (including newly released controls). If the request included a list of security controls that are disabled in the configuration policy, Security Hub enables all other controls (including newly released controls).

ConnectorArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connectorV2.

ConnectorId.description: The UUID of the connectorV2 to identify connectorV2 resource.

AuthUrl.description: The Url provide to customers for OAuth auth code flow.

FindingAggregatorArn.description: The ARN of the finding aggregator. You use the finding aggregator ARN to retrieve details for, update, and stop cross-Region aggregation.

FindingAggregationRegion.description: The home Region. Findings generated in linked Regions are replicated and sent to the home Region.

RegionLinkingMode.description: Indicates whether to link all Regions, all Regions except for a list of excluded Regions, or a list of included Regions.

Regions.description: The list of excluded Regions or included Regions.

UnprocessedAccounts.description: The list of Amazon Web Services accounts that were not processed. For each account, the list includes the account ID and the email address.
The list of Amazon Web Services accounts that were not processed. For each account, the list includes the account ID and the email address.

ActionTargetArn.description: The ARN of the custom action target that was deleted.

InsightArn.description: The ARN of the insight that was deleted.

UnprocessedAccounts.description: The list of Amazon Web Services accounts for which the invitations were not deleted. For each account, the list includes the account ID and the email address.
The list of Amazon Web Services accounts that were not deleted. For each account, the list includes the account ID and the email address.

ProductSubscriptionArn.description: The ARN of your subscription to the product to enable integrations for.

AdminAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account identifier of the account to designate as the Security Hub administrator account.

Feature.description: The feature where the delegated administrator is enabled. The default is Security Hub CSPM if no delegated administrator is specified in the request.

UnprocessedAccounts.description: The list of Amazon Web Services accounts that could not be processed. For each account, the list includes the account ID and the email address.

ConfigurationPolicyId.description: The UUID of the configuration policy.

TargetId.description: The identifier of the target account, organizational unit, or the organization root with which the configuration is associated.

TargetType.description: Indicates whether the target is an Amazon Web Services account, organizational unit, or the organization root.

AssociationType.description: Indicates whether the association between the specified target and the configuration was directly applied by the Security Hub delegated administrator or inherited from a parent.

UpdatedAt.description: The date and time, in UTC and ISO 8601 format, that the configuration policy association was last updated.

AssociationStatus.description: The current status of the association between the specified target and the configuration.

AssociationStatusMessage.description: An explanation for a FAILED value for AssociationStatus.

AggregationRegion.description: The Amazon Web Services Region where data is aggregated.

RegionLinkingMode.description: Determines how Amazon Web Services Regions should be linked to the Aggregator V2.

LinkedRegions.description: A list of Amazon Web Services Regions linked to the aggegation Region.

Arn.description: The ARN of the configuration policy.

Id.description: The UUID of the configuration policy.

Name.description: The name of the configuration policy.

Description.description: The description of the configuration policy.

UpdatedAt.description: The date and time, in UTC and ISO 8601 format, that the configuration policy was last updated.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time, in UTC and ISO 8601 format, that the configuration policy was created.

ConfigurationPolicy.description: An object that defines how Security Hub is configured. It includes whether Security Hub is enabled or disabled, a list of enabled security standards, a list of enabled or disabled security controls, and a list of custom parameter values for specified controls. If the request included a list of security controls that are enabled in the configuration policy, Security Hub disables all other controls (including newly released controls). If the request included a list of security controls that are disabled in the configuration policy, Security Hub enables all other controls (including newly released controls).

FindingAggregationRegion.description: The home Region. Findings generated in linked Regions are replicated and sent to the home Region.

RegionLinkingMode.description: Indicates whether to link all Regions, all Regions except for a list of excluded Regions, or a list of included Regions.

Regions.description: The list of excluded Regions or included Regions.
